headline: Artifact extraction is the new bottleneck.
body: Ten thousand tiles but only 104 artifacts extracted means a one-percent yield. The rest is ballast — useful for training, not for shipping. Fleets that increase extraction rates without drowning in noise will outrun those that don't.
fleet_relevance: tile-refiner shipped tonight specifically to raise this yield. More signal, less noise.
actionable: Run tile-refiner against your highest-volume room
Set an extraction threshold and automate the pipeline
